skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Search the web for up-to-date information, news, and documentation. Supports query refinement and result summarization.

skills.name: Web Reader
skills.description: Fetch and extract content from web pages. Converts HTML to clean text or markdown for agent consumption.

skills.name: Code Search
skills.description: Search codebases by pattern, function name, or content. Supports regex, glob patterns, and multi-file search.

skills.name: File Operations
skills.description: Read, write, create, and manage files and directories. Supports text editing, file watching, and batch operations.

skills.name: Shell Execution
skills.description: Execute shell commands and scripts. Supports streaming output, timeout control, and environment configuration.

skills.name: Git Operations
skills.description: Perform git operations including commit, push, pull, branch management, diff analysis, and merge conflict resolution.

skills.name: Data Analysis
skills.description: Analyze datasets, generate statistics, create visualizations, and extract insights from structured and unstructured data.

skills.name: API Client
skills.description: Make HTTP requests to external APIs. Supports REST, GraphQL, authentication, rate limiting, and response parsing.

skills.name: Database Query
skills.description: Connect to and query databases (SQLite, PostgreSQL, MySQL). Execute SQL, manage schemas, and export results.

skills.name: Document Generator
skills.description: Generate structured documents including reports, summaries, API docs, and technical specifications in various formats.

skills.name: Image Analysis
skills.description: Analyze images using AI vision models. Extract text (OCR), describe content, and compare visual elements.

skills.name: Task Planner
skills.description: Break down complex tasks into actionable steps, manage dependencies, and track progress across multi-step workflows.
